name: Pskov Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the lakes and rivers of the Pskov land and the heavens
the cloud bearing the hand of God and the historic silver field of Pskov heraldry
the golden leopard of the Pskov arms

description: A blue field with a narrow white vertical stripe along the hoist (1/7 of the flag's length) carrying a row of red triangles in the Pskov architectural 'runner' ornament; in the centre of the blue field is a golden walking leopard blessed by a hand emerging from a silver cloud.
history: Adopted on 25 December 2018 by the Pskov Regional Assembly of Deputies; Pskov was the last Russian federal subject to adopt an official flag.

features.symbolism: the white hoist strip (1/7 of the length) carries a row of red triangles in the Pskov 'runner' ornament; the blue field bears the heraldic emblem of the oblast.
a golden walking leopard, the heraldic emblem of Pskov, blessed from above by a hand emerging from a silver cloud — the historic Pskov coat of arms confirmed in 1781.
